meaning: n.货物,船货,运费,货运vt.装货,使充满,运送
examples: Trains are taking a lot of freight that used to be routed via trucks.
On the customs declaration, the sender labelled the freight as agricultural machinery.
Almost all the world's freight goes by sea, rail, and road.
There are a number of exceptions where the affluent are highly motivated to pay full freight.
TransEuropa had run passenger and freight services between Ramsgate and Ostend for the last 15 years.
